Table franchise.franchisee {
  franchisee_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the franchise partner.']
  area_representative_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to franchise.area_representative. Business justification: A franchisee is managed by a single Area Representative; linking franchisee to area_representative enables reporting of franchisee assignments and eliminates need for separate mapping tables.']
  bank_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.bank_account. Business justification: Royalty payment processing requires linking each franchisee to its bank account for ACH transfers; experts expect a direct bank_account_id FK.']
  distribution_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.distribution_center. Business justification: Assigning each franchisee to a primary distribution center supports logistics planning and delivery scheduling reports.']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to loyalty.program. Business justification: Enables franchisee to assign a specific loyalty program for its restaurants, required for franchise‑level program performance reporting.']
  territory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to franchise.territory. Business justification: Franchisee belongs to a geographic territory; linking franchisee to territory via territory_id enables proper reporting and eliminates reliance on free‑text codes.']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the franchisee\'s primary business address.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the franchisee\'s primary business address, if applicable.']
  annual_revenue decimal(15,2) [note: 'Reported annual gross revenue of the franchisee.']
  average_unit_volume decimal(12,2) [note: 'Average sales volume per unit for the franchisee.']
  city varchar [note: 'City of the franchisee\'s primary business address.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance status with brand standards and regulatory requirements.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the franchisee\'s primary business address.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the franchisee record was first created in the system.']
  credit_rating varchar [note: 'Credit rating assigned to the franchisee by a rating agency. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: aaa|aa|a|bbb|bb|b|ccc|cc|c|d — promote to reference product]']
  dba_name varchar [note: 'Trade name under which the franchisee operates, if different from the legal name.']
  established_date date [note: 'Date the franchisee entity was legally formed.']
  fdd_disclosure_status varchar [note: 'Status of the Franchise Disclosure Document compliance for the franchisee.']
  food_safety_certified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the franchisee holds a current food safety certification (e.g., ServSafe).']
  franchise_fee_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Initial fee paid by the franchisee for the franchise rights.']
  franchisee_number varchar [note: 'Unique business identifier assigned to the franchisee for internal tracking.']
  franchisee_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the franchisee partnership.']
  franchisee_type varchar [note: 'Legal structure of the franchisee entity.']
  ifa_membership_status varchar [note: 'International Franchise Association membership status of the franchisee.']
  industry_segment varchar [note: 'Segment of the restaurant industry the franchisee operates in.']
  insurance_expiry_date date [note: 'Expiration date of the current insurance policy.']
  insurance_policy_number varchar [note: 'Policy number for the franchisee\'s liability and property insurance.']
  legal_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the franchisee entity as registered with government authorities.']
  next_renewal_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next franchise agreement renewal.']
  number_of_units varchar [note: 'Total number of restaurant locations operated by the franchisee.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code of the franchisee\'s primary business address.']
  royalty_fee_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary amount of royalty fees calculated for a reporting period.']
  royalty_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of gross sales payable to the brand as royalty.']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State or province of the franchisee\'s primary business address.']
  state_tax_number varchar [note: 'State-level tax identification number for the franchisee.']
  tax_id_ein varchar [note: 'Federal tax identification number for the franchisee.']
  termination_date date [note: 'Date the franchise agreement was terminated, if applicable.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the franchisee record.']

  Note: 'Master record for each franchise partner entity — the legal business entity (individual, LLC, corporation) that holds one or more franchise agreements with the brand. Captures franchisee identity, legal structure, ownership details, contact information, financial standing, FDD disclosure status, IFA membership, and FranConnect system ID. SSOT for franchise partner identity across the enterprise.'
}

Table franchise.agreement {
  agreement_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the franchise agreement record.']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the franchisee party.']
  franchisor_legal_entity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the franchisor (company) party.']
  legal_entity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the franchisor (company) party.']
  territory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to franchise.territory. Business justification: A franchise agreement is tied to a specific geographic territory; adding territory_id FK normalizes territory data and removes redundant code/description fields.']
  agreement_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier assigned to the agreement (e.g., FA-2023-001).']
  agreement_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the agreement.']
  agreement_type varchar [note: 'Classifies the agreement as initial, renewal, transfer, or amendment.']
  amendment_effective_date date [note: 'Date when the amendment becomes effective.']
  amendment_number varchar [note: 'Sequential number of the amendment applied to the agreement.']
  average_unit_volume decimal(12,2) [note: 'Projected average sales per unit location for the franchisee.']
  compliance_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance audit of the agreement.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Result of the latest compliance review.']
  contract_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the agreement (e.g., v1, v2).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the agreement record was first created in the system.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Scheduled expiration date of the agreement (null for open‑ended).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date the agreement becomes legally binding.']
  ftc_compliance_attestation_flag boolean [note: 'Attestation that the agreement complies with FTC Franchise Rule disclosures.']
  initial_fee_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Up‑front fee paid by the franchisee to obtain the franchise rights.']
  marketing_fee_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of sales contributed to the brand‑wide marketing fund.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form text for additional comments, special conditions, or observations.']
  renewal_fee_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Fee payable by the franchisee to renew the agreement for the next term.']
  renewal_term_years varchar [note: 'Number of years for each renewal period after the initial term.']
  royalty_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Ongoing royalty percentage of gross sales payable to the franchisor.']
  sales_target_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Target gross sales amount the franchisee commits to achieve during the term.']
  signed_date date [note: 'Date the agreement was signed by both parties.']
  termination_date date [note: 'Actual date the agreement was terminated prior to its scheduled end.']
  transfer_rights_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the franchisee may transfer the agreement to another party.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the agreement record.']

  Note: 'Authoritative record of each franchise agreement between the franchisor and a franchisee, encompassing the full agreement lifecycle from execution through renewal, transfer, or termination. Captures agreement type (initial, renewal, transfer, successor), effective and expiration dates, territory grant, initial franchise fee, royalty rate and basis, marketing fund contribution rate, renewal terms, and agreement status. Owns all lifecycle event records including: transfers (transferor/transferee, ROFR exercise, approval, transfer conditions, effective date), renewals (updated terms, FDD re-disclosure, renewal fee, execution date), and terminations (type, default notice, cure period, de-identification, post-termination obligations, non-compete). SSOT for all contractual franchise obligations and their complete lifecycle history. Supports FTC Franchise Rule Items 5, 6, 17 disclosure requirements.'
}

Table franchise.territory {
  territory_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the territory.']
  distribution_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.distribution_center. Business justification: Territory‑level supply routing uses a designated DC; needed for regional supply‑chain optimization and KPI dashboards.']
  area_sq_miles decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total land area of the territory in square miles.']
  assignment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the territory assignment process.']
  average_unit_volume decimal(12,2) [note: 'Average sales per unit (AUV) across locations in the territory (USD).']
  city varchar [note: 'Primary city associated with the territory.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current food‑safety and regulatory compliance status of the territory.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code for the territory.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the territory record was created.']
  dma varchar [note: 'DMA region identifier for the territory.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the territory expires or is terminated (null if open‑ended).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the territory became effective for the franchisee.']
  franchise_fee decimal(12,2) [note: 'One‑time fee charged to the franchisee for the territory grant.']
  geometry_wkt varchar [note: 'Well‑Known Text representation of the territory\'s polygon boundary.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance inspection for the territory.']
  median_income decimal(12,2) [note: 'Median household income for the territory (USD).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information about the territory.']
  number_of_locations varchar [note: 'Count of restaurant units operating within the territory.']
  population varchar [note: 'Estimated resident population within the territory.']
  radius_miles decimal(5,2) [note: 'Radius in miles for circular territories (if applicable).']
  region varchar [note: 'Two‑letter state or province code for the territory.']
  royalty_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Royalty percentage applied to franchisee sales within the territory.']
  territory_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code assigned to the territory.']
  territory_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the territory\'s characteristics.']
  territory_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the territory.']
  territory_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the territory.']
  territory_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the territory\'s exclusivity rights.']
  trade_area_classification varchar [note: 'Business classification of the trade area based on demographics and spend.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the territory record.']
  zip_codes varchar [note: 'List of ZIP codes included in the territory, separated by commas.']

  Note: 'Defines the protected or exclusive geographic territory granted to a franchisee under a franchise agreement. Captures territory boundaries (polygon, zip codes, DMA, radius), territory type (exclusive, protected, non-exclusive), population count, trade area classification, territory status, and assignment history. Supports territory conflict resolution and development pipeline planning.'
}

Table franchise.billing {
  billing_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for billing']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to franchise.franchisee. Business justification: Franchise billing records are generated per franchisee; linking to franchisee provides ownership and enables reporting.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of all periodic franchise fees billed to a franchisee for a specific reporting period, including royalties, marketing fund contributions, technology fees, and other recurring charges. Captures billing period, gross sales reported, rates applied, line-item amounts (royalty, marketing fund, technology, other), total amount billed, payment due date, payment status, and variance from prior period. Source of truth for franchise revenue recognition, AR aging, and marketing fund governance. Supports FDD Item 6 and Item 11 disclosure compliance.'
}

Table franchise.sales_report {
  sales_report_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the sales report record.']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the franchise partner submitting the report.']
  location_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the restaurant location to which the sales data applies.']
  submitted_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Identifies the employee submitting the sales report, providing audit trail, accountability, and performance monitoring for franchisee reporting.']
  unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the restaurant location to which the sales data applies.']
  adjustments_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Sum of discounts, taxes, and other adjustments applied to gross sales.']
  audit_trail varchar [note: 'Chronological log of key actions performed on the report (e.g., submissions, approvals).']
  average_check_value decimal(10,2) [note: 'Average dollar amount per transaction for the reporting period.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the sales report record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency used for monetary values.']
  daypart_sales_breakdown varchar [note: 'JSON string summarizing sales by daypart (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner).']
  franchise_fee decimal(15,2) [note: 'Fixed fee charged to the franchisee for brand usage during the period.']
  gross_sales_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total gross sales reported for the period before any deductions.']
  net_sales_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Net sales after adjustments; basis for royalty calculations.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments entered by the franchisee or reviewer.']
  report_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the sales report by the franchisee.']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'Last calendar date of the reporting period covered by the sales report.']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'First calendar date of the reporting period covered by the sales report.']
  reporting_period_type varchar [note: 'Granularity of the reporting period (e.g., weekly, monthly).']
  royalty_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Calculated royalty amount based on royalty_rate and net_sales_amount.']
  royalty_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage rate applied to net sales to calculate royalty owed.']
  sales_report_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the sales report.']
  same_store_sales decimal(15,2) [note: 'Comparable sales metric for existing stores, used for performance benchmarking.']
  submission_method varchar [note: 'Channel used by the franchisee to submit the report.']
  submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the franchisee submitted the sales report.']
  transaction_count varchar [note: 'Total number of individual transactions (average transaction count) recorded in the period.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the sales report record.']
  validation_status varchar [note: 'Result of the automated/manual validation process.']
  variance_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary amount of the variance when variance_flag is true.']
  variance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether reported figures deviate beyond predefined thresholds.']

  Note: 'Franchisee-submitted periodic gross sales report used as the basis for royalty and marketing fund calculation, SSS (Same-Store Sales) tracking, and operational benchmarking. Captures reporting period (weekly, monthly), reported gross sales by daypart, net sales, transaction count (ATC), average check value (ACV), submission date, submission method (POS auto-pull, manual entry, EDI), validation status, and variance flags. Supports royalty billing, comp sales analysis, franchisee performance benchmarking, and FDD Item 19 financial performance representation validation.'
}

Table franchise.nro_pipeline {
  nro_pipeline_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each NRO pipeline record.']
  consultant_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the development consultant assigned to the project.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the development consultant assigned to the project.']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the franchisee responsible for the new restaurant.']
  actual_capex_spent decimal(15,2) [note: 'Cumulative capital expenditures incurred to date.']
  actual_open_date date [note: 'Date the restaurant actually opened for business.']
  actual_opex_spent decimal(15,2) [note: 'Cumulative operating expenses incurred to date.']
  brand varchar [note: 'Brand classification of the restaurant (e.g., Quick-Service, Casual, Fine Dining).']
  budget_capex decimal(15,2) [note: 'Approved capital expenditure budget for the project.']
  budget_opex decimal(15,2) [note: 'Approved operating expense budget for the pre‑opening period.']
  capital_investment_estimate decimal(15,2) [note: 'Projected capital expenditure required to open the restaurant, in USD.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current status of regulatory and brand compliance for the project.']
  construction_complete_flag boolean [note: 'True when construction is finished.']
  construction_start_flag boolean [note: 'True when construction work has commenced.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the NRO pipeline record was first created.']
  development_type varchar [note: 'Category of the restaurant development: new build, conversion of existing location, or remodel.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date the NRO agreement becomes effective (typically the target open date).']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date the NRO agreement ends or is superseded; null if open‑ended.']
  expected_acuv decimal(10,2) [note: 'Forecasted average transaction value (USD) for the new restaurant.']
  expected_cogs_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Projected Cost of Goods Sold as a percentage of sales.']
  expected_labor_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Projected labor cost as a percentage of sales.']
  expected_roi decimal(5,2) [note: 'Forecasted ROI for the new restaurant over a 12‑month horizon.']
  expected_traffic_volume varchar [note: 'Projected daily customer count for the first 30 days after opening.']
  health_inspection_score varchar [note: 'Score from the most recent health inspection (0‑100).']
  last_milestone_date date [note: 'Date when the most recent project milestone was achieved.']
  last_milestone_name varchar [note: 'Name of the most recent milestone (e.g., "Construction Complete").']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the project.']
  opening_announced_flag boolean [note: 'True when the grand opening has been publicly announced.']
  permits_obtained_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether all required permits have been secured.']
  project_code varchar [note: 'External business identifier for the NRO project, used in reporting and contracts.']
  project_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the NRO development project.']
  project_status varchar [note: 'Overall status of the NRO project.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Assessed risk category for the project.']
  stage varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle stage of the NRO project. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: site_identified|loi_signed|lease_executed|permits_obtained|construction_started|construction_complete|training_complete|opened|closed — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  stage_change_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the project moved into the current stage.']
  target_open_date date [note: 'Planned date for the restaurant to begin operations.']
  territory_code varchar [note: 'Geographic territory code where the new restaurant will be located.']
  training_complete_flag boolean [note: 'True when staff training is completed.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the NRO pipeline record.']

  Note: 'Tracks all franchise capital construction and development projects from initiation through completion, including New Restaurant Openings (NROs), remodels, reimaging, refreshes, and conversions. Captures project type (new build, conversion, full remodel, refresh, reimaging, ADA compliance), project stage (site identified, LOI signed, lease executed, permits obtained, construction started, construction complete, training complete, opened/completed), target and actual completion dates, development type, assigned development consultant, capital investment estimate, approved contractor, permit and inspection status, brand approval status, contractual obligation source, and milestone completion dates. SSOT for the franchise development and facility lifecycle in FranConnect.'
}

Table franchise.development_schedule {
  development_schedule_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the franchise development schedule.']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the franchisee to whom the development schedule is assigned.']
  territory_id varchar [note: 'Geographic territory identifier governing the development schedule.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance assessment of the franchisee against the development schedule.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the development schedule record was first created in the system.']
  cure_period_months varchar [note: 'Number of months granted to the franchisee to cure a schedule breach before penalties apply.']
  development_phase varchar [note: 'Current phase of the development schedule lifecycle.']
  development_schedule_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the schedule (active, inactive, suspended, completed, default).']
  end_date date [note: 'Date when the development schedule expires if the required units are not opened.']
  last_compliance_check date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance review for the development schedule.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional comments, exceptions, or special conditions related to the schedule.']
  schedule_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the development schedule, used in franchise contracts and reporting.']
  schedule_type varchar [note: 'Category of the development agreement (e.g., Multi-Unit Development Agreement, single-unit, renewal).']
  schedule_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the schedule record to track revisions.']
  start_date date [note: 'Date when the development schedule becomes effective and the franchisee may begin opening units.']
  target_units_year_1 varchar [note: 'Number of units the franchisee must open in the first calendar year of the schedule.']
  target_units_year_2 varchar [note: 'Number of units the franchisee must open in the second calendar year of the schedule.']
  target_units_year_3 varchar [note: 'Number of units the franchisee must open in the third calendar year of the schedule.']
  total_units_committed varchar [note: 'Total number of restaurant units the franchisee has agreed to open under the schedule.']
  units_opened_to_date varchar [note: 'Cumulative count of units the franchisee has opened to date under this schedule.']
  units_remaining varchar [note: 'Number of units still required to meet the schedule commitment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the development schedule record.']

  Note: 'Contractual development schedule committing a franchisee to open a specified number of restaurants within defined time windows under a multi-unit development agreement (MUDA). Captures total units committed, units opened to date, units remaining, development period start and end dates, annual opening targets by year, cure period terms, and schedule compliance status. Supports franchise development pipeline forecasting and default tracking.'
}

Table franchise.compliance_audit {
  compliance_audit_id varchar [pk, note: 'System‑generated unique identifier for each compliance audit record.']
  auditor_employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the internal or external auditor who performed the audit.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the internal or external auditor who performed the audit.']
  franchise_franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the franchised restaurant unit subject to the audit.']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the franchised restaurant unit subject to the audit.']
  audit_disposition varchar [note: 'Final outcome of the audit after any follow‑up actions.']
  audit_location_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the restaurant location where the audit was performed.']
  audit_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments and observations recorded by the auditor.']
  audit_number varchar [note: 'External audit reference number used in franchise compliance reporting.']
  audit_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system that supplied the audit data (e.g., Zenput, FranConnect).']
  audit_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the audit was performed on site.']
  audit_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the audit execution method.']
  brand_standards_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Compliance percentage for the Brand Standards section.']
  cleanliness_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Compliance percentage for the Cleanliness section.']
  compliance_audit_status varchar [note: 'Current processing state of the audit record.']
  corrective_action_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether any corrective actions must be taken as a result of the audit.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp when the audit record was first created.']
  critical_violations_count varchar [note: 'Number of critical compliance violations identified during the audit.']
  equipment_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Compliance percentage for the Equipment section.']
  food_safety_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Compliance percentage for the Food Safety section.']
  non_critical_violations_count varchar [note: 'Number of non‑critical compliance violations identified during the audit.']
  overall_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Aggregated compliance percentage across all audit sections (0‑100).']
  service_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Compliance percentage for the Service section.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp of the most recent modification to the audit record.']

  Note: 'Records the results of brand standards compliance audits conducted at franchised restaurant units. Captures audit date, audit type (scheduled, unannounced, follow-up), auditor identity, overall compliance score, section scores (food safety, cleanliness, service, brand standards, equipment), critical and non-critical violation counts, corrective action required flag, and audit disposition (pass, conditional pass, fail). Supports franchise agreement compliance enforcement and performance scorecard inputs.'
}

Table franchise.franchise_corrective_action {
  franchise_corrective_action_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the franchise_corrective_action data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to franchise.franchisee. Business justification: Corrective actions issued to a franchisee need to be tied to that franchisee for tracking and compliance.']

  Note: 'Tracks corrective action plans (CAPs) issued to franchisees following compliance audit failures, brand standards violations, or contractual defaults. Captures violation description, severity level, corrective action required, due date, responsible party, resolution status, follow-up audit date, escalation level, and cure period expiration. Supports IFA best practices for franchisee remediation and FTC Franchise Rule default notice requirements.'
}

Table franchise.fee_schedule {
  fee_schedule_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for fee_schedule']
  agreement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to franchise.franchise_agreement. Business justification: Fee schedule entries are defined by a specific franchise agreement; linking to agreement captures contractual context.']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to franchise.franchisee. Business justification: Fee schedule fees are charged to a particular franchisee; linking provides financial attribution.']
  territory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to franchise.territory. Business justification: Fee schedule rates vary by territory; linking to territory enables territorial reporting and compliance.']

  Note: 'Records all one-time and recurring franchise fees charged to franchisees beyond royalties, including initial franchise fees, renewal fees, transfer fees, training fees, technology fees, and marketing fund contributions. Captures fee type, fee amount, billing trigger event, payment status, waiver or discount applied, and associated agreement. Complements royalty_invoice which handles periodic royalty billing specifically.'
}

  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the enrollment agreement ends (typically the scheduled completion date or certification expiration).']
  enrollment_date timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the trainee was enrolled in the training program.']

  hours_required decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total number of training hours required for completion.']

  scheduled_completion_date date [note: 'Planned date by which the trainee should complete the training.']
  score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score achieved in the training assessment (0‑100).']
  training_enrollment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the enrollment.']
  training_type varchar [note: 'Mode of delivery for the training.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the enrollment record.']

  Note: 'Tracks franchisee and designated manager enrollment and completion of required brand training programs (initial training, refresher, new product, food safety certification). Captures trainee identity, training program name, training type (classroom, online, in-restaurant), enrollment date, scheduled completion date, actual completion date, pass/fail status, certification issued, and expiration date. Supports compliance tracking for brand standards and ServSafe/NRA certification requirements.'
}

Table franchise.franchise_remodel_project {

}

Table franchise.transfer_event {
  transfer_event_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the transfer event record.']
  agreement_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the underlying franchise agreement being transferred.']
  approval_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'System identifier of the user who approved the transfer.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'System identifier of the user who approved the transfer.']
  primary_transferor_franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the franchisee transferring ownership.']
  compliance_review_date date [note: 'Date when the transfer compliance review was performed.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance standing of the transfer with FTC and franchise regulations.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the transfer event record was first created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for monetary amounts. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: USD|EUR|GBP|CAD|AUD|JPY|CHF|CNY|MXN|BRL — promote to reference product]']
  effective_transfer_date date [note: 'Date the ownership transfer becomes legally effective.']
  event_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the transfer event was recorded in the system.']
  fdd_redisclosure_date date [note: 'Date the Franchise Disclosure Document was re‑disclosed to the transferee as required by FTC.']
  franchisor_approval_date date [note: 'Date the franchisor approved the transfer request.']
  marketing_fee_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Post‑transfer marketing fee percentage payable by the new franchisee.']
  new_territory_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the geographic territory assigned to the transferee after the transfer.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form comments or observations about the transfer.']
  previous_territory_code varchar [note: 'Code of the territory previously held by the transferor.']
  right_of_first_refusal_exercised_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the franchisor or existing franchisee exercised a right of first refusal.']
  royalty_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Post‑transfer royalty percentage the new franchisee must pay to the franchisor.']
  total_transfer_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Aggregate monetary amount of the transfer (fee plus tax).']
  transfer_conditions varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of any special conditions, covenants, or contingencies attached to the transfer.']
  transfer_event_status varchar [note: 'Current processing state of the transfer event.']
  transfer_fee_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary fee charged for the franchise transfer, before tax.']
  transfer_fee_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the transfer fee must be paid.']
  transfer_fee_paid_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the transfer fee has been fully paid.']
  transfer_fee_tax_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Tax component applied to the transfer fee.']
  transfer_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the transfer event for tracking and audit purposes.']
  transfer_reason varchar [note: 'Business reason prompting the franchise transfer.']
  transfer_type varchar [note: 'Category of the franchise transfer (e.g., sale, inheritance, estate, corporate acquisition, internal reassignment).']
  units_transferred varchar [note: 'Count of restaurant units (stores) included in the transfer.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the transfer event record.']

  Note: 'Records the transfer of a franchise agreement or restaurant unit from one franchisee to another, including ownership changes, estate transfers, and corporate acquisitions. Captures transfer type, transferor franchisee, transferee franchisee, units transferred, transfer fee paid, FDD re-disclosure date, franchisor approval date, effective transfer date, right of first refusal exercise status, and transfer conditions. Supports FTC Franchise Rule transfer disclosure requirements.'
}

Supports franchise lifecycle management and revenue forecasting.'

  effective_termination_date date [note: 'Date the termination legally takes effect.']
  ftc_compliance_attestation_flag boolean [note: 'Flag indicating franchisee attested to FTC compliance for termination disclosure.']
  legal_dispute_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a legal dispute is associated with the termination.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-form notes related to the termination event.']

  termination_event_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the termination event.']

  termination_fee_currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO currency code for the termination fee.']
  termination_notice_method varchar [note: 'Method used to deliver the termination notice.']
  termination_reason varchar [note: 'Free-text reason provided for the termination.']
  termination_type varchar [note: 'Category of termination: voluntary, default, non-renewal, or abandonment.']
  units_affected varchar [note: 'Number of restaurant units impacted by the termination.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the termination event record.']

  Note: 'Records franchise agreement termination and non-renewal events including voluntary terminations, defaults, and forced closures. Captures termination type (voluntary, default, non-renewal, abandonment), notice date, cure period expiration, effective termination date, units affected, outstanding royalty balance, post-termination obligations (de-identification, non-compete), and legal dispute flag. Supports FTC Franchise Rule Item 17 disclosure and franchise portfolio management.'
}

Table franchise.performance_scorecard {
  performance_scorecard_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each franchisee performance scorecard record.']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the franchisee to which this scorecard applies.']
  average_unit_volume decimal(12,2) [note: 'Average weekly sales per restaurant unit for the franchisee, expressed in local currency.']
  compliance_audit_average_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Average score from all compliance audits performed during the period, on a 0‑100 scale.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the scorecard record was first created.']
  customer_satisfaction_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Average customer satisfaction rating collected from surveys, on a 0‑100 scale.']
  evaluation_month varchar [note: 'Numeric month (1‑12) of the evaluation period.']
  evaluation_period_end date [note: 'Last day of the evaluation period covered by the scorecard.']
  evaluation_period_start date [note: 'First day of the evaluation period covered by the scorecard.']
  evaluation_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the scorecard record.']
  evaluation_type varchar [note: 'Frequency classification of the scorecard (e.g., annual, quarterly, monthly).']
  evaluation_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year in which the evaluation period falls.']
  food_safety_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Composite score from food safety inspections and audits, on a 0‑100 scale.']
  net_promoter_score varchar [note: 'Net promoter score for the franchisee, ranging from -100 to 100.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the scorecard.']
  number_of_restaurants varchar [note: 'Count of active restaurant units owned or operated by the franchisee.']
  overall_performance_tier varchar [note: 'Tier classification of franchisee performance for the period.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO code representing the primary geographic region of the franchisee.']
  royalty_payment_timeliness_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of royalty invoices paid on or before the due date during the period.']
  same_store_sales_growth_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Year‑over‑year percentage change in same‑store sales for the franchisee portfolio.']
  total_royalty_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total royalty fees accrued for the franchisee during the period.']
  total_sales_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Aggregate gross sales across all franchisee locations for the evaluation period.']
  training_completion_rate_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Proportion of required franchisee staff training modules completed on schedule.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent modification to the scorecard record.']

  Note: 'Periodic franchisee performance evaluation record aggregating key operational and financial KPIs for a franchisee across their restaurant portfolio. Captures evaluation period, AUV (Average Unit Volume), SSS (Same-Store Sales) growth, CSAT score, NPS, compliance audit average score, royalty payment timeliness, training completion rate, food safety score, and overall performance tier (platinum, gold, silver, at-risk). Supports franchisee recognition programs and remediation prioritization.'
}

Table franchise.fdd_disclosure {
  fdd_disclosure_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each FDD disclosure record.']
  prospect_id varchar [note: 'Foreign‑key reference to the franchisee or prospect receiving the disclosure.']
  recipient_prospect_id varchar [note: 'Foreign‑key reference to the franchisee or prospect receiving the disclosure.']
  acknowledgment_received_date date [note: 'Date the recipient signed or otherwise confirmed receipt of the disclosure.']
  compliance_review_date date [note: 'Calendar date the compliance team completed its review.']
  compliance_review_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the disclosure has passed FTC Franchise Rule compliance review.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the disclosure record was entered into the system.']
  delivery_date date [note: 'The calendar date the FDD was provided to the prospect or franchisee.']
  document_title varchar [note: 'Descriptive title of the FDD document (e.g., "2023 Franchise Disclosure Document").']
  document_type varchar [note: 'Classifies the document as an initial disclosure, an amendment, or a supplemental update.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which the disclosed version expires and must be superseded.']
  fdd_disclosure_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the disclosure is in draft, has been issued to a recipient, archived, or revoked.']
  fdd_document_url varchar [note: 'Secure URL or path where the electronic copy of the disclosure is stored.']
  fdd_version_number varchar [note: 'Internal version code (e.g., "2023‑01") assigned to the disclosure document.']
  material_change_description varchar [note: 'Narrative explaining the nature of any material change flagged.']
  material_change_flag boolean [note: 'True if the disclosed document contains material changes that could affect the prospect\'s decision.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional comments or observations related to the disclosure.']
  recipient_type varchar [note: 'Identifies whether the recipient is a new prospect, an existing franchisee, or a prospective franchisee.']
  state_code varchar [note: 'ISO‑3166‑2 style two‑letter code of the US state for registration status.']
  state_registration_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the disclosure has been registered with the state regulatory authority.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the latest modification to the disclosure record.']
  version_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year associated with the specific version of the FDD.']
  waiting_period_end_date date [note: 'Date when the 14‑day waiting period ends, after which the prospect may sign agreements.']
  waiting_period_start_date date [note: 'Date when the 14‑day waiting period begins after delivery of the disclosure.']

  Note: 'Tracks each Franchise Disclosure Document (FDD) version issued to prospective and existing franchisees in compliance with FTC Franchise Rule. Captures FDD version year, state-specific registration status (for registration states), disclosure delivery date, recipient franchisee or prospect, 14-day waiting period start and end dates, acknowledgment receipt date, and material change flags. SSOT for FTC Franchise Rule pre-sale disclosure compliance.'
}

Table franchise.prospect {
  prospect_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the franchise development prospect.']
  assigned_consultant_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal development consultant responsible for the prospect.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal development consultant responsible for the prospect.']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the prospect\'s mailing address.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the prospect\'s mailing address, if applicable.']
  application_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the franchise application.']
  application_submitted_date date [note: 'Date the prospect submitted the franchise application.']
  background_check_date date [note: 'Date when the background check was completed.']
  background_check_status varchar [note: 'Result of the prospect\'s background screening.']
  city varchar [note: 'City component of the prospect\'s mailing address.']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the prospect has attested to required FTC and IFA compliance statements.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address used for prospect communications.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for the prospect.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code for the prospect\'s address.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the prospect record was first created.']
  discovery_day_attended boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the prospect attended a Discovery Day session.']
  discovery_day_date date [note: 'Date of the Discovery Day attended by the prospect.']
  estimated_initial_investment decimal(18,2) [note: 'Prospect\'s estimated total investment required to launch the franchise.']
  estimated_initial_investment_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the estimated initial investment.']
  expected_open_date date [note: 'Projected date for the new restaurant to open if the prospect is approved.']
  fdd_disclosure_date date [note: 'Date the Franchise Disclosure Document was provided to the prospect.']
  fdd_sent_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the FDD has been sent to the prospect.']
  franchise_type_preference varchar [note: 'Preferred restaurant format (e.g., Quick‑Service, Casual, Fine‑Dining).']
  last_contact_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent interaction with the prospect.']
  last_contact_method varchar [note: 'Channel used for the most recent contact with the prospect.']
  legal_entity_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the prospect is an individual or a corporate entity.']
  liquid_capital_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Available liquid capital of the prospect.']
  liquid_capital_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the liquid capital amount.']
  net_worth_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Prospect\'s total net worth, used for financial qualification.']
  net_worth_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the net worth amount.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes captured by development staff about the prospect.']
  pipeline_stage varchar [note: 'Specific stage of the franchise development funnel.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code of the prospect\'s mailing address.']
  prospect_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the individual or entity seeking a franchise.']
  prospect_status varchar [note: 'Current overall status of the prospect in the development pipeline.']
  source_channel varchar [note: 'Origin of the prospect lead.']
  source_detail varchar [note: 'Additional free‑text information about the lead source.']
  state varchar [note: 'State or province component of the prospect\'s mailing address.']
  territory_preference varchar [note: 'Geographic territory or market the prospect prefers for a franchise location.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last updated the prospect record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the prospect record.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created the prospect record.']

  Note: 'Master record for franchise development prospects — individuals or entities in the pipeline to become franchisees. Captures prospect source (referral, trade show, digital lead, broker, area representative), contact details, financial qualification status (net worth, liquid capital per FDD Item 7 requirements), background check status, discovery day attendance, FDD disclosure date, 14-day waiting period compliance, application status, assigned development consultant, pipeline stage, and conversion probability. Supports franchise development funnel management and FTC pre-sale compliance tracking.'
}

Table franchise.area_representative {
  area_representative_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the area representative.']
  territory_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the geographic territory assigned.']
  area_representative_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status.']
  average_unit_volume_target decimal(12,2) [note: 'Target AUV for franchisees in the territory.']
  base_salary_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Fixed salary component (if applicable).']
  commission_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Commission rate applied to sales or royalties.']
  compensation_type varchar [note: 'Type of compensation arrangement.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance standing with franchise standards.']
  created_by_user varchar [note: 'System user who created the record.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'When the record was first created in the system.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the agreement ends (nullable if ongoing).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the representative\'s agreement becomes effective.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email for communication.']
  external_reference_number varchar [note: 'Identifier used in external systems (e.g., FranConnect).']
  fee_structure_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of fees charged to the representative.']
  full_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the area representative.']
  last_compliance_review_date date [note: 'Date of most recent compliance audit.']
  market_segment varchar [note: 'Segment classification of the territory market.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes regarding the representative.']
  number_of_franchisees_managed varchar [note: 'Count of franchisees under the representative\'s oversight.']
  performance_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Composite score evaluating representative performance (e.g., based on sales, compliance).']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary contact phone.']
  primary_contact_method varchar [note: 'Preferred method of contact.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Standard code for the broader region (e.g., NA, EU).']
  role_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the representative\'s role within franchise hierarchy.']
  royalty_fee_cap_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum royalty fee payable to the representative.']
  royalty_split_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of royalty revenue shared with the representative.']
  training_completed_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if mandatory training has been completed.']
  updated_by_user varchar [note: 'System user who last updated the record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last time the record was modified.']

  Note: 'Master record for Area Representatives (ARs) and Area Developers who hold sub-franchisor rights to recruit, support, and oversee franchisees within a defined geographic region. Captures AR entity name, territory covered, AR agreement effective and expiration dates, royalty split percentage, number of franchisees under management, performance obligations, and AR fee structure. Supports multi-tier franchise system management.'
}

Table franchise.support_visit {
  support_visit_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the support visit record.']
  consultant_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the field business consultant (FBC) who performed the visit.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the field business consultant (FBC) who performed the visit.']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the franchisee restaurant unit that received the support visit.']
  store_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific restaurant location visited.']
  unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific restaurant location visited.']
  action_items varchar [note: 'Detailed description of action items identified for the franchisee after the visit.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the visited restaurant is located.']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether any compliance issues were identified during the visit.']
  compliance_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score (0‑100) summarizing overall compliance performance observed.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the restaurant location.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the support visit record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the expense amount.']
  equipment_inspected_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether kitchen or back‑of‑house equipment was inspected.']
  equipment_issue_count varchar [note: 'Number of equipment issues identified during the inspection.']
  expense_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary cost incurred for the support visit (travel, lodging, etc.).']
  expense_category varchar [note: 'Category of the expense associated with the support visit.']
  follow_up_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a follow‑up visit or action is required after this support visit.']
  is_training_visit boolean [note: 'True if the visit included formal training for franchise staff.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form observations or comments recorded by the consultant.']
  region varchar [note: 'Broad geographic region (e.g., Midwest, West Coast) of the visited restaurant.']
  sales_impact_estimate decimal(12,2) [note: 'Projected increase or decrease in sales attributable to the support visit actions.']
  satisfaction_rating varchar [note: 'Numeric rating (1‑5) provided by the franchisee to assess visit effectiveness.']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State or province of the visited restaurant location.']
  support_visit_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the support visit.']
  topics_covered varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of operational, marketing, financial, or training topics addressed during the visit.']
  training_topic varchar [note: 'Specific training subject covered during the visit (e.g., food safety, service standards).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the support visit record.']
  visit_duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Total time spent on the support visit, measured in minutes.']
  visit_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable sequential number assigned to the support visit.']
  visit_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the support visit actually occurred.']
  visit_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the visit purpose (e.g., scheduled, unannounced, follow‑up, opening support).']
  waste_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Estimated percentage of food waste observed during the visit.']

  Note: 'Records field support visits conducted by franchise business consultants (FBCs) or field operations teams to franchisee restaurant units. Captures visit date, visit type (scheduled, unannounced, follow-up, opening support), FBC identity, topics covered (operations, marketing, financial review, training), action items identified, franchisee satisfaction rating, and follow-up required flag. Supports franchisee relationship management and field support effectiveness tracking.'
}

Table franchise.marketing_fund_contribution {
  marketing_fund_contribution_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the franchise_marketing_fund_contribution data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to franchise.franchisee. Business justification: Marketing fund contributions are made by franchisees; adding franchisee_id creates the required relationship and resolves the siloed marketing_fund_contribution table.']

  Note: 'Tracks franchisee contributions to the national and regional marketing/advertising fund as required by the franchise agreement. Captures contribution period, contribution rate applied, gross sales basis, contribution amount, fund type (national advertising fund, regional co-op, local), payment status, and cumulative YTD contribution. Supports marketing fund governance, co-op advertising management, and FDD Item 11 advertising disclosure compliance.'
}

Table franchise.lease_agreement {
  lease_agreement_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the LeaseAgreement association']
  franchisee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the franchisee tenant']
  landlord_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the landlord property owner']
  base_rent_amount decimal [note: 'Monthly base rent amount agreed in the lease']
  lease_end_date date [note: 'Date the lease ends']
  lease_start_date date [note: 'Date the lease begins']
  lease_term_months varchar [note: 'Length of the lease in months']
  lease_type varchar [note: 'Classification of lease (e.g., gross, net, triple‑net)']
  rent_escalation_rate decimal [note: 'Annual rent escalation percentage']

  Note: 'Represents the contractual lease relationship between a franchisee and a landlord, capturing rent, term, escalation, and type details for each property lease.. Existence Justification: Franchisees (tenants) can lease properties from multiple landlords, and landlords can lease to multiple franchisees. The lease agreement is an operational contract that is created, updated, and terminated by business users and contains its own data such as rent amount, term, and escalation.'
}

Table foodsafety.haccp_plan {
  haccp_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the HACCP plan record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee responsible for the HACCP plan.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee responsible for the HACCP plan.']
  allergen_control_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether allergen control procedures are defined in the plan.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date the HACCP plan received formal approval.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current approval state of the HACCP plan.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name of the food safety manager or authority who approved the plan.']
  audit_last_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent HACCP audit.']
  audit_next_due date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next HACCP audit.']
  audit_status varchar [note: 'Result of the most recent HACCP audit.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current overall compliance standing of the HACCP plan.']
  corrective_action_procedure varchar [note: 'Standard steps to be taken when a CCP deviation occurs.']
  critical_control_points varchar [note: 'List of CCPs defined in the plan, stored as a delimited string.']
  document_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the HACCP document in the document lifecycle.']
  document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the stored electronic version of the HACCP plan.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the HACCP plan becomes effective and enforceable.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the HACCP plan expires or is superseded; null if open‑ended.']
  hazard_analysis_summary varchar [note: 'Brief narrative summarizing identified hazards and risk assessments.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent review of the HACCP plan.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the HACCP plan.']
  monitoring_frequency varchar [note: 'How often each CCP is monitored.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next mandatory review of the HACCP plan.']
  non_conformance_count varchar [note: 'Number of recorded non‑conformances since the last review.']
  plan_code varchar [note: 'External business code or identifier used to reference the HACCP plan in reports and audits.']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the HACCP plan for the restaurant unit.']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the plan based on the entity it governs (e.g., restaurant, franchise, corporate, supplier).']
  plan_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the HACCP plan, typically following a major.minor scheme.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the HACCP plan record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the HACCP plan record.']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Regulatory standard(s) the HACCP plan aligns with.']
  revision_number varchar [note: 'Sequential revision count for the HACCP plan.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Overall risk rating assigned to the plan.']
  sanitation_schedule_reference varchar [note: 'Link or code to the sanitation schedule tied to this HACCP plan.']
  scope_description varchar [note: 'Narrative describing the physical or operational scope covered by the plan.']
  temperature_log_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier or path to the temperature log data associated with this plan.']
  temperature_monitoring_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if temperature monitoring is a required control in this plan.']
  training_completion_date date [note: 'Date when required training was completed.']
  training_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether staff training is required for this plan.']

  Note: 'Master record for each restaurant units Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP) plan, including plan version, scope, approval status, regulatory framework alignment (FDA FSMA, ISO 22000, Codex Alimentarius), effective and expiration dates, responsible food safety manager, team members, and prerequisite program references. Serves as the authoritative SSOT for HACCP program governance across all company-owned and franchised units. Each plan undergoes annual review and revalidation.'
}

Table foodsafety.critical_control_point {
  critical_control_point_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the critical control point.']
  haccp_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to foodsafety.haccp_plan. Business justification: Each Critical Control Point belongs to a single HACCP plan; adding haccp_plan_id creates the required parent link.']
  responsible_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Required: Each CCP must have a qualified employee monitor it; linking enables CCP compliance reports and corrective‑action tracking.']
  average_deviation_value decimal(10,2) [note: 'Average magnitude of deviations observed across monitoring events.']
  corrective_action_procedure varchar [note: 'Standardized steps to take when a deviation from the critical limit occurs.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the CCP record was first created in the system.']
  critical_control_point_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code used to reference the CCP in SOPs and audits.']
  critical_control_point_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the critical control point.']
  critical_control_point_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the CCP.']
  critical_limit_max decimal(10,2) [note: 'Upper bound of the acceptable range for the control parameter (e.g., maximum temperature).']
  critical_limit_min decimal(10,2) [note: 'Lower bound of the acceptable range for the control parameter (e.g., minimum temperature).']
  deviation_count varchar [note: 'Cumulative number of recorded deviations from the critical limits.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the CCP is retired or superseded; null if still active.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the CCP became effective.']
  haccp_plan_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the HACCP plan to which this CCP belongs.']
  hazard_type varchar [note: 'Category of hazard the CCP is designed to control.']
  is_critical boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the CCP is classified as a critical control point (true) or a control point (false).']
  last_monitored_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent monitoring observation.']
  last_verification_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent verification activity.']
  monitoring_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the CCP is monitored.']
  monitoring_method varchar [note: 'Technique or instrument used to monitor the CCP (e.g., calibrated thermometer).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the CCP.']
  process_step varchar [note: 'Operational step in the food preparation flow where the CCP applies.']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Applicable regulatory or certification reference (e.g., FDA FSMA, ISO 22000, ServSafe).']
  responsible_role varchar [note: 'Job role accountable for monitoring and maintaining the CCP.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Measurement unit for the critical limit values.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the CCP record.']
  verification_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the CCP is independently verified for compliance.']
  verification_method varchar [note: 'Method used during verification (e.g., internal audit, third‑party audit).']

  Note: 'Defines each Critical Control Point (CCP) within a HACCP plan, including the hazard type (biological, chemical, physical), critical limits (min/max temperature, pH, time), monitoring method, corrective action procedure, and verification frequency. Each CCP is tied to a specific process step (e.g., cooking, cooling, receiving) and HACCP plan version.'
}

Table foodsafety.food_safety_audit {
  food_safety_audit_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key for the food safety audit record.']
  auditor_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the auditor who performed the audit.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Audit expense tracking: each food safety audit is charged to a cost center for cost control and audit cost reporting.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the auditor who performed the audit.']
  restaurant_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the restaurant location where the audit was conducted.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to realestate.site. Business justification: Food safety audits are conducted at a specific restaurant location; associating audits with site_id supports site‑wide audit tracking and rent‑related compliance.']
  supply_supplier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.supply_supplier. Business justification: Food safety audits are performed on suppliers; linking audit to supplier enables audit‑by‑supplier reports required by regulatory compliance.']
  unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the restaurant location where the audit was conducted.']
  allergen_control_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates compliance with allergen control requirements.']
  attached_documents_count varchar [note: 'Number of supporting documents attached to the audit record.']
  audit_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the audit, often used in reports and communications.']
  audit_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the audit was performed on site.']
  audit_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the audit source: internal, third‑party, or health department.']
  auditor_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the auditor.']
  compliance_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Aggregated compliance score based on weighted findings.']
  corrective_action_deadline date [note: 'Date by which all corrective actions must be completed.']
  corrective_action_status varchar [note: 'Current status of corrective actions associated with the audit.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the audit record was first created in the system.']
  critical_findings_count varchar [note: 'Number of critical (high‑severity) findings identified.']
  food_safety_audit_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the audit.']
  haccp_plan_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the HACCP plan referenced during the audit.']
  non_critical_findings_count varchar [note: 'Number of non‑critical (low‑severity) findings identified.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text field for auditor observations, comments, and recommendations.']
  overall_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score representing overall compliance, typically 0‑100.']
  pass_fail varchar [note: 'Overall result indicating whether the audit passed or failed.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Regulatory authority overseeing the audit.']
  sanitation_schedule_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates compliance with scheduled sanitation procedures.']
  temperature_monitoring_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates if temperature monitoring met required standards during the audit.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the audit record.']

  Note: 'Header-and-line transactional record of each food safety audit conducted at a restaurant unit, including audit metadata (type: internal/third-party/health-department, date, auditor, overall score, pass/fail) and individual findings (category: critical/major/minor, regulatory reference, corrective action required, responsible party, due date, resolution status). Managed via Zenput. Supports QA compliance tracking, trend analysis, and regulatory reporting. Each audit contains zero-to-many findings as line items.'
}

Table foodsafety.audit_finding {
  audit_finding_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the audit finding record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Remediation cost allocation: corrective actions for findings are budgeted against a cost center.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee or contractor accountable for corrective action.']
  food_safety_audit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to foodsafety.food_safety_audit. Business justification: Audit findings are recorded under a specific food safety audit; adding food_safety_audit_id links findings to their audit.']
  responsible_party_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee or contractor accountable for corrective action.']
  restaurant_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the restaurant unit where the audit was performed.']
  unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the restaurant unit where the audit was performed.']
  audit_finding_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative of the violation or observation.']
  audit_finding_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the finding.']
  corrective_action varchar [note: 'Prescribed action required to remediate the finding.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the finding record was first created in the system.']
  due_date date [note: 'Date by which the corrective action must be completed.']
  finding_category varchar [note: 'High‑level domain of the finding (e.g., HACCP, sanitation).']
  finding_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable identifier assigned to the finding within the audit.']
  finding_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the finding was recorded during the audit.']
  has_attachment boolean [note: 'Indicates whether supporting documentation (photos, files) is attached.']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Code or citation of the applicable regulation (e.g., FDA Food Code section).']
  resolution_date date [note: 'Date when the finding was closed or resolved.']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'Categorical severity classification of the finding.']
  severity_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric risk score (0‑100) representing the seriousness of the finding.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that captured the finding (e.g., Zenput).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the finding record.']

  Note: 'Individual finding or violation recorded during a food safety audit, capturing finding category (critical, major, minor), description, regulatory reference (FDA Food Code, local health code), corrective action required, responsible party, due date, and resolution status. Each finding is linked to a specific audit and restaurant unit.'
}

Table foodsafety.health_inspection {
  health_inspection_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the health inspection record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Inspection cost accounting: health inspection fees and related expenses are charged to a cost center.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'System identifier for the inspector.']
  restaurant_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the restaurant location inspected.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to realestate.site. Business justification: Regulatory health inspection reports are filed per physical site; linking enables site‑level compliance dashboards and audit trails.']
  stock_location_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to inventory.stock_location. Business justification: Health inspections evaluate specific storage locations; linking enables location‑level inspection reports and corrective actions.']
  unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the restaurant location inspected.']
  agency_name varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory agency that performed the inspection.']
  attachment_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if supporting documents (photos, reports) are attached.']
  closure_order_date date [note: 'Date when the closure order was issued.']
  closure_order_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the inspection resulted in a closure order.']
  compliance_code varchar [note: 'Regulatory framework or code applicable to the inspection.']
  corrective_action_deadline date [note: 'Date by which corrective actions must be completed.']
  corrective_action_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if corrective actions are required.']
  corrective_action_status varchar [note: 'Current status of required corrective actions.']
  fee_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO currency code for the inspection fee.']
  follow_up_inspection_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the follow-up inspection.']
  follow_up_inspection_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if a follow-up inspection is mandated.']
  inspection_date date [note: 'Date when the health inspection was conducted.']
  inspection_fee_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Fee charged by the agency for conducting the inspection.']
  inspection_number varchar [note: 'Official inspection number assigned by the regulatory agency.']
  inspection_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the inspection record.']
  inspection_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date and time when the health inspection took place.']
  inspection_type varchar [note: 'Category of the inspection based on its trigger.']
  inspector_code varchar [note: 'System identifier for the inspector.']
  inspector_name varchar [note: 'Name of the inspector who performed the health inspection.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional comments or observations recorded by the inspector.']
  overall_grade varchar [note: 'Overall grade assigned by the inspector.']
  pass_fail varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the restaurant passed the inspection.']
  permit_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the health permit.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the inspection record was first entered into the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the inspection record.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Overall risk classification based on inspection findings.']
  score varchar [note: 'Numeric score representing compliance level (higher is better).']
  violation_summary varchar [note: 'Brief description of the violations identified.']
  violations_count varchar [note: 'Number of violations cited in the inspection.']

  Note: 'Header-and-line record of official health inspections conducted by local health departments or regulatory authorities at restaurant units, including inspection header (date, inspector, agency, type: routine/follow-up/complaint-driven, overall grade, permit status, closure orders) and individual violations as line items (violation code, severity: critical/non-critical, FDA Food Code citation, corrective action required, compliance deadline, re-inspection outcome). This is the authoritative regulatory inspection record distinct from internal food safety audits.'
}

Table foodsafety.inspection_violation {
  inspection_violation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the inspection violation record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the inspector who recorded the violation.']
  health_inspection_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the health inspection that generated this violation.']
  restaurant_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the restaurant location where the violation was observed.']
  unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the restaurant location where the violation was observed.']
  area_of_concern varchar [note: 'Physical area within the restaurant where the violation occurred.']
  compliance_deadline date [note: 'Date by which the corrective action must be completed to achieve compliance.']
  corrective_action_required varchar [note: 'Action that must be taken to remediate the violation.']
  corrective_action_status varchar [note: 'Current progress status of the corrective action.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the violation record was first created in the system.']
  evidence_photo_url varchar [note: 'Link to photographic evidence associated with the violation.']
  follow_up_inspection_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the re‑inspection after corrective actions.']
  inspection_violation_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the violation record.']
  inspector_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the inspector who recorded the violation.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form comments or observations about the violation.']
  penalty_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Monetary penalty assessed for the violation, if any.']
  penalty_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the penalty amount.']
  regulatory_citation varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific regulatory provision (e.g., FDA Food Code section) that the violation breaches.']
  reinspection_outcome varchar [note: 'Result of the follow‑up inspection after corrective actions were taken.']
  severity varchar [note: 'Severity level of the violation indicating its impact on food safety.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'System or process that captured the violation record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the violation record.']
  violation_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code assigned to the violation by the regulatory authority.']
  violation_description varchar [note: 'Full textual description of the violation observed during the inspection.']
  violation_reported_by varchar [note: 'Full name of the inspector who reported the violation.']
  violation_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date and time when the violation was observed.']
  violation_type varchar [note: 'Broad category describing the nature of the violation.']
